This '''Unnamed Devaronian''' was part of the commando team lead by [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] to disable some shield bunkers protecting the [[Trihexalon]] factory on [[Nod Kartha]]. When the commando team was under heavy fire at the last shield bunker, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] made a hole in the bunker and provide cover for the team to escape just as the timed charges blew.

==Behind the scenes==
This Devaronian character model was used in the game mission for the unit 'Commando' in the game.

The character has not been officially named.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' {{1st}}
